title: Project Report: Employee Onboarding Flow — ServiceNow Developer / Administrator
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Flow Designer automation: new hire triggers tasks for IT, HR, and facilities with approval steps.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Employee Onboarding Flow** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for ServiceNow Developer / Administrator. Duration: 3–4 weeks. Flow Designer automation: new hire triggers tasks for IT, HR, and facilities with approval steps. Tools: ServiceNow PDI, Flow Designer.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Record-triggered flow on new hire
Objective: Parallel tasks for IT/HR/Facilities
Objective: Manager approval step
Objective: Dashboard showing onboarding status
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
ServiceNow Developer / Administrator portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a ServiceNow Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a ServiceNow Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Flow
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Flow** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Record-triggered flow. Complete these tasks: Trigger conditions; Variables. Deliverable for this phase: Flow diagram export.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Trigger conditions
- [ ] Variables
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Flow is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
ServiceNow Developer / Administrator agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Flow diagram export to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: Flow export XML; Demo video; Dashboard screenshot. Skills demonstrated: Flow Designer, Automation, ITSM. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Flow export XML
Deliverable: Demo video
Deliverable: Dashboard screenshot
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Flow export XML and passes the rubric.
